question: Will Chainsaw Man part 3 be announced?
textDescription:
backroundslop: Chainsaw Man Part 2 has confirmed that its final chapter will arrive on March 24th, 2026. Creator Tatsuki Fujimoto has confirmed that there is only one entry remaining in the manga's second half, leaving many to wonder if this will be the grand finale or if a third part of Chainsaw Man will eventually be released. For context, part 2 was announced immediately after part 1’s conclusion.

Resolves no if no official source announces part 3 by end of May 2026, or if any official source confirms that part 2 is the end of the series.

Must be called part 3. Spinoffs don’t count. If ASI tiles the earth with paperclips before resolution this resolves to 69%. If the SF Bay Area is destroyed by nuclear weapons before resolution this resolves to the last bitcoin block number before detonation modulo 100. If bitcoin ceases to exist before resolution this market resolves N/A
newsShortReason: Final chapter of Chainsaw Man Part 2 released without announcement of Part 3.
